More ads than gameplay. No instruction. First thing I saw was for me to pay for VIP, which screams "We just want your money!". First lesson in business, especially with gaming, put the gamers first. Not your company. Secondly I can just take what you have and give what the gamers want and be the one to make the money. It's fake multiplayer and the controls are so janky, let me explain It forces you to watch ads, what if someone has an ad blocker? So they start before everyone else? And you immediately get to see who wins if you lose, if there was real players you would have to spectate before seeing who wins Now for controls, the controls are bad and the joystick is incredibly sensitive and you turn way too fast.

there are alot of ads if we pass a level it gives ad and most of the time don't allow to go to another level.

This is similar to "Stumble guys", except this has too many bugs. The controller is so hard to control, it moves to other places when you clearly wanted to go to the other place. It has adds every few seconds, I know you want to earn from it but at least let us play in peace. It's too glitchy, and there's only a few mini games compared to "stumble guys"

Not gonna lie,the game is pretty bad. It just completely copied "Fall guys".The game says it's multiplayer but there all just bots. The game puts an ad every minute! Even wen you're "playing online". The game is too laggy, it makes it impossible to play! I would give one star but because I hope for a change I won't. I'm dissatisfied whit the game,do not recommend.

it's an okay game, i played it for about 1 hour and a half but got bored. I's way too easy, and there aren't many boards, so it gets repetitive quickly. there's no point in leveling up your character or their items because all you have to do is roll around in the maps, it gets you a super far distance. and in some maps one roll will probably complete almost half in the map

The game is cute in general, but there are a lot of problems beside that. Whenever I play the football mini game, my team gets to the other teams goal, and throws the ball backwards then the other team scores a point. I wish you could play with real people, and you could make friends so that you can play with them. The crown mini game is really hard and I only win if I'm very lucky. Other then that, great game just like fall guys.

The first time I installed this app, I had fun with it at first, until when an update came about, things got badder. They may had added more levels but the others levels got affected. The colours are much more duller, the background music stopped playing and for some strange reason, I realised that this game never ever chooses the level "Fruit Run" For me, this game doesn't feel competitive enough and I wished if the creators of the game could see what I am saying and change things back.

Many of the mini games are almost impossible to win. There is an ad after every single mini game match, so half of the experience are ads. The controls are hard, the hamsters trip over too much, and some skins are rip offs of popular anime like Pokémon or Sailor Moon. If there were less ads and hamsters didn't trip over in mid air, maybe I would play it. I would give this a 1 star but I'll give it a 2 because of the 3Ds and shadows.

It was good, showed players getting eliminated and I thought that was cool, but only one problem... ADS. WAY to many aggressive ads before you do anything. Ads ads ads. You won! Reward: 5 MORE ADS. Would be a great gam if it wasn't for the ads. Make it so there are less ads and I will give it 5 stars.

First this game was released way too fast, looks unfinished unpolished and is really basic. The gameplay is well there is just one-way too play one type of race. It's a paale copy of stumble guys a really pale one and the worst is the free trial to go ad free well it's a lie you have to watch ads be careful

My God, the damn ads Awesome game and I would have kept it but the ads forced down your throat In-between each stage (stage lasts anywhere from 10 sec to a couple mins) on average about 30 seconds just to have a 27+ sec ad pop up. A couple of times just watching the ad didn't count to progress so I had to watch another ad. There is a $3 remove ad option but I don't trust that it would work due to being duped before on another app after purchasing.

Dumb game. Of course good for little kids but otherwise highly don't recommend.

Its a good game, but I wish there was more to it. There's like, a few mini games (to become the winner or something), maybe you could add some more? And now that I've unlocked the characters, idk what to do with the coins left off, it's just building up. Apart from that I'd say its a good game, the graphics are really good and I like the whole 3D adventure.

Don't get me wrong, I LOVE this game, but there are just so many things wrong with it. Why can't we have an online mode and just compete with actual players? The AI is just too easy to beat as well. And... Ads, ads, ADS! I finish a round? AD. I start a new game? AD. They're just everywhere, man... I also kinda miss the old version of this game. This isn't the STAR I remember. No power ups. Some of these courses weren't even here back then. It's still a great game, tho.

Fun game but if it was online, and you could friend people and play together it would be so much more fun, you should also make more mini games and get rid of the crown one, it would also get you more players because people are more likely to play with friends, I would also appreciate more skins/ make them customizable like your pictures show, if you do see this please make these changes, thanks!

It's a good game but it's laggy. It's okay I guess. It's a cute game, but I'm almost 100% sure people playing it are not real people because they play an ad before every round and everyone moves the same without a single unique strategy. It lags a lot but thats probably on me, and I think when choosing a gamemode it should go quicker considering the people in the game aren't even real. You should add a multiplayer and a singleplayer mode I think.

It's a OK game. I recommend this game to the people who are bored and lonely. Good things: I love the characters, so chubby and cute! The customization thing is awesome, you can change every little detail. There's also rarity (common, uncommon and so on) Bad things: This game needs WIFI even though your playing with bots, which is nonsense. Playing with bots is kind of boring now since you can win easily. Thanks for reading my review! Follow "Aonuii" on ROBLOX to support me! Enjoy your day!

I love STAR. The games are fun and entertaining, the skins are funny and cute, and the ads are barely noticeable not because there aren't a lot (there are), but because they are right after one of the mini games, and it's actually OK because you get to take a little break in-between challenges. The only thing I noticed that is remotely negative is that the graphics could be just a little better. Overall, I would recommend this game as a little game to pass the time and have a blast!
